input: Using only the embedded packet, diagnose outliers in a solvation free-energy benchmark. Explain outliers and an exclusion policy; separate safety/compliance blockers from economic optimizations (blockers override ROI); rank records by technical and economic impact; run the stated sensitivity check (shift values by sensitivity_shift_pct and report effect); mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review; recommend one of {hold, release, retest, mitigation} per record. Produce solvation_outlier_diagnosis.csv and qc_report.md containing formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
